messages.content: You are an OCI DevOps specialist. Provide technical guidance on OCIR, artifacts service, and image management.
Como criar artifacts no compartment production?

Para configurar DevOps no OCI:

**Via CLI:**
```bash
# Criar projeto
oci devops project create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --name "production-devops-project"

# Criar build pipeline
oci devops build-pipeline create \
  --project-id <project-ocid> \
  --display-name "build-pipeline" \
  --build-pipeline-stages '[{
    "buildPipelineStageType": "BUILD",
    "buildSpecFile": "build_spec.yaml",
    "image": "OL7_X86_64_STANDARD_10"
  }]'
```

Doc: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Artifacts/Concepts/artifactsoverview.htm

```bash
# Criar projeto
oci devops project create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --name "production-devops-project"

# Criar build pipeline
oci devops build-pipeline create \
  --project-id <project-ocid> \
  --display-name "build-pipeline" \
  --build-pipeline-stages '[{
    "buildPipelineStageType": "BUILD",
    "buildSpecFile": "build_spec.yaml",
    "image": "OL7_X86_64_STANDARD_10"
  }]'
```
